repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #88180 as the canonical fix for preserving explicit IDENTITY.md expression defaults in the agent system prompt. Current main still lacks the IDENTITY-specific guidance line, while #88180 is the narrow 2-file version rebuilt from the closed broad #65777. The repair is proof/preflight focused: keep the contributor branch, rerun focused prompt tests, rerun changed checks, and get Real behavior proof green before any later merge decision.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(prompt): preserve IDENTITY defaults in system prompt
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Preserve explicit IDENTITY.md expression defaults in the Project Context guidance when IDENTITY.md is loaded.
- Keep the repair scoped to src/agents/system-prompt.ts and src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts.
- Carries forward @yozu's source work from #88180, rebuilt from the superseded #65777 without the broad approval/renderer changes.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts
- node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed
- Real behavior proof check green on the repaired head
- Codex /review clean before merge consideration
validation_commands: node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed
